name: mcp-paradex
description: MCP server for Paradex perpetual futures trading platform — market data, account management, order placement, and vault operations.
long_description: Connect AI assistants to the Paradex decentralized perpetual futures exchange. Access real-time market data including orderbooks, trades, funding rates, and klines. Monitor account positions, balances, and transaction history. Place and manage orders with support for market, limit, stop, and take-profit order types. Track vault performance, positions, and transfers. Supports both read-only market data access and authenticated trading when configured with account credentials.

tools.name: paradex_system_config
tools.description: Get Paradex system configuration including exchange parameters, fee schedules, and trading limits.

tools.name: paradex_system_state
tools.description: Get the current Paradex system operational status and server timestamp.

tools.name: paradex_filters_model
tools.description: Get JSON schema for data models used in JMESPath filtering (MarketDetails, MarketSummary, OrderState, Vault, VaultSummary).

tools.name: paradex_markets
tools.description: List available markets with details like tick size, min order size, and leverage limits. Supports JMESPath filtering and pagination.

tools.name: paradex_market_summaries
tools.description: Get market summaries with price, volume, and 24h change data. Supports JMESPath filtering and pagination.

tools.name: paradex_funding_data
tools.description: Get funding rate data for a specific market including funding rates, index prices, and premium.

tools.name: paradex_orderbook
tools.description: Get the orderbook (bids and asks) for a specific market at configurable depth.

tools.name: paradex_klines
tools.description: Get OHLCV candlestick data for a market at various resolutions (1m to 1h).

tools.name: paradex_trades
tools.description: Get recent trades for a specific market with fill data, size, price, and timestamps.

tools.name: paradex_bbo
tools.description: Get the best bid and offer (BBO) with spread data for a specific market.

tools.name: paradex_vaults
tools.description: List vaults with metadata, owner, operator, and strategy information. Supports JMESPath filtering.

tools.name: paradex_vault_balance
tools.description: Get token balances for a specific vault.

tools.name: paradex_vault_summary
tools.description: Get vault performance summaries including ROI, P&L, volume, and drawdown metrics.

tools.name: paradex_vault_transfers
tools.description: Get deposit and withdrawal transfer history for a specific vault.

tools.name: paradex_vault_positions
tools.description: Get open positions for a specific vault.

tools.name: paradex_vault_account_summary
tools.description: Get vault account summary with health, margin, and leverage details.

tools.name: paradex_account_summary
tools.description: Get account summary with value, free collateral, and margin requirements. Requires authentication.

tools.name: paradex_account_positions
tools.description: Get all open positions with P&L, liquidation price, and leverage. Requires authentication.

tools.name: paradex_account_fills
tools.description: Get trade fill history with price, size, fees, and realized PnL. Requires authentication.

tools.name: paradex_account_funding_payments
tools.description: Get funding payment history for account positions. Requires authentication.

tools.name: paradex_account_transactions
tools.description: Get account transaction history including deposits, withdrawals, and trades. Requires authentication.

tools.name: paradex_open_orders
tools.description: List currently open orders with status and fill details. Requires authentication.

tools.name: paradex_create_order
tools.description: Place a new order (market, limit, stop, take-profit). Supports GTC, IOC, and POST_ONLY instructions. Requires authentication.

tools.name: paradex_cancel_orders
tools.description: Cancel orders by order ID, client ID, or all orders in a market. Requires authentication.

tools.name: paradex_order_status
tools.description: Check the status of a specific order by order ID or client ID. Requires authentication.

tools.name: paradex_orders_history
tools.description: Get historical orders for a market within a time range. Requires authentication.

paradex_account_private_key.title: Account Private Key
paradex_account_private_key.description: Your Paradex account private key (StarkNet). Required for trading, account, and order tools. Leave empty for read-only market data access.

paradex_account_address.title: Account Address
paradex_account_address.description: Your Paradex account address (StarkNet). Optional — derived from private key if not provided.
